title: stelis decurva
intro: Stelis decurva is a type of orchid species known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis decurva include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to treat wounds and promote skin health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed as a medicinal tea.
